title: 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 RX450h Outer Taillight LED Brake Light Lens Housing Replacement Instructions
description: Replace the outer tail light assembly on a 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 and RX450h, covering trim removal, connector access, bulb transfer, and reinstallation.
tips: You do not need to remove the entire interior panel to disconnect the wiring connectors — use a small screwdriver to unclip them through the opening instead.
Be careful not to drop the three 10mm nuts inside the vehicle — they can roll around and cause rattling noise and may be difficult to retrieve.
The studs are intentionally long on this vehicle, which helps prevent nuts from sliding off during removal.
The top mounting nut is harder to reach — loosen it with a small ratchet and finish by hand.
The replacement tail light assembly may not come with bulbs — transfer the bulb sockets from the old unit.
When reinstalling the tail light, align the green clip with its slot first, then line up the bolt holes before sliding it in.
When reinstalling trim panels, make sure the weather stripping is not caught underneath.
